title: Focus device closure, MF feel tuning, and state expression cleanup

implemented: Confirmed MF remains independent from bottom five parameters
Corrected manual focus zone text so 0.0 maps to near and 1.0 maps to far
Refined MF ruler tick step from 0.05 to 0.025
Increased MF ruler drag threshold to 40pt
Increased MF ruler step cooldown to 0.12s
Updated MF entry hint to clarify left-near and right-far semantics

validation.known_device_feedback: R59 MF device validation was reported normal by the user.

residual_risks: MF tick density may need per-device tuning after more physical-device validation.
Without peaking or magnifier, users still judge focus through the live preview.
MF mode tap-focus suppression should remain under observation for user comprehension.
next_package: R61 Focus device recheck and MF low-ruler small-screen/lens-difference minimal corrections
